title: JSW Steel is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: JSW Steel is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, JSW Steel in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About JSW Steel:
JSW Steel is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JSW Steel!
